heading: Great Ape Conservation Fund
label: 6304 Great Ape Conservation Fund
notes: Amendments2019—Subsec. (b)(2). substituted “$150,000” for “$100,000”.Pub. L. 116–92006—Subsec. (b)(2). substituted “expend” for “expand” and “$100,000” for “$80,000”.Pub. L. 109–363

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), upon request by the Secretary, the Secretary of the Treasury shall transfer from the Fund to the Secretary, without further appropriation, such amounts as the Secretary determines are necessary to provide assistance under .section 6303 of this title

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: 2 Administrative expenses
children.text: Of the amounts in the account available for each fiscal year, the Secretary may expend not more than 3 percent, or up to $150,000, whichever is greater, to pay the administrative expenses necessary to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall invest such portion of the Fund as is not, in the judgment of the Secretary of the Treasury, required to meet current withdrawals. Investments may be made only in interest-bearing obligations of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: on original issue at the issue price; or

children.label: B
children.text: by purchase of outstanding obligations at the market price.

children.heading: Sale of obligations
children.label: 3 Sale of obligations
children.text: Any obligation acquired by the Fund may be sold by the Secretary of the Treasury at the market price.

children.heading: Credits to Fund
children.label: 4 Credits to Fund
children.text: The interest on, and the proceeds from the sale or redemption of, any obligations held in the Fund shall be credited to and form a part of the Fund.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The amounts required to be transferred to the Fund under this section shall be transferred at least monthly from the general fund of the Treasury to the Fund on the basis of estimates made by the Secretary of the Treasury.

children.heading: Adjustments
children.label: 2 Adjustments
children.text: Proper adjustment shall be made in amounts subsequently transferred to the extent prior estimates were in excess of or less than the amounts required to be transferred.

children.heading: Acceptance and use of donations
children.label: e Acceptance and use of donations
children.text: The Secretary may accept and use donations to provide assistance under . Amounts received by the Secretary in the form of donations shall be transferred to the Secretary of the Treasury for deposit into the Fund.section 6303 of this title
